title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer (AI-Native)
summary:
Senior Full-Stack Engineer (AI-Native)
Cardiff, Inc.

Cardiff, Inc. Remote (US)

Reports to Managing Partner Works directly with Lead AI Architect

About Cardiff
Cardiff is an AI-first, remote-first alternative lender. We've funded over $10B to small businesses and have been named "America's Favorite Small Business Lender" two years running. ~100 people across 12+ states and Mexico. Stack: Salesforce, Snowflake, Google Workspace, Zoom, Rippling.
We're not bolting AI onto a legacy company. We're rebuilding the company around it: our own API, an AI-native gateway, ML-powered risk decisioning, and agentic SMS/email/voice outreach, all backed by a continuously learning data and intelligence layer.

The Role
We're hiring a Senior Full-Stack Engineer who is genuinely AI-native. Someone who treat
responsibilities: Take prototypes to production in days, not weeks
Partner closely with our Lead AI Architect on architecture, system design, and the evolution of Cardiff's AI platform
Build and ship AI agents touching real customers (SMS, email, voice) with measurable business outcomes: lead nurturing, transactions, retention
Integrate across Salesforce, Snowflake, Gmail, Zoom, Slack, and internal services
Own the full lifecycle: backend, frontend, deployment, monitoring, iteration
Work directly with operations, sales, underwriting, and marketing leaders. Translate business needs into shipped product the same week
Iterate relentlessly in production. We'd rather ship a v1 today and refine it Monday than ship a perfect v1 next month
